introSection:
Tree Top Racers was a Miler Manufacturing roller coaster located at Adventure City in Anaheim, California, USA. The ride closed after the 2012 season and was removed the following year. It was replaced with Rewind Racers.

One of the ride's cars is now located at the National Roller Coaster Museum in Plainview, Texas, USA.
fullText:
Tree Top Racers was a Miler Manufacturing roller coaster located at Adventure City in Anaheim, California, USA. The ride closed after the 2012 season and was removed the following year. It was replaced with Rewind Racers.

One of the ride's cars is now located at the National Roller Coaster Museum in Plainview, Texas, USA.



Blue track and orange supports.
